free_text: Light charged particle release in 252Cf spontaneous
Cf source of ~1.2E+5 fis./sec in 4PI sr.
consisting of 45microm thick surface barrier dE
detector of 15 mm diameter and Si(Li)-drift E-detector
with 3 mm depleted zone, to measure LCP.
LF, HF and LCP in coincidence.
LF from HF separation was done by their
proton - 4 MeV, triton - 4.6 MeV, alpha - 12 MeV.
3.1 deg for tritons, maximally ~7.5 deg in the case
Measured relative ( alpha rate was taken 100.)
Proton background from (n,p) reactions was measured.
For energy loss of LCP in environment materials.
Type of uncertainty is not explained in the
Zeitschrift fuer Physik A, Hadrons and Nuclei,
Angular distribution of protons from spontaneous
ternary fission, proton angle ANG-RL - relative to
the liht fragment, data units are 1/sr .
